name: Cinnamon Peach Tart
recipeInstructions:
Cinnamon Dough:
1. Form a large ring of flour on your work surface.
2. In the center of the flour ring, make a mound of sugar, baking powder, and cinnamon; also make a mound of butter cut into small squares.
3. With the palm of your hand, cream the butter and add to the sugar mixture while continuing to cream.
4. Push the flour into the center and blend with the butter/sugar mixture into a coarse meal.
5. Add all the water, pressing to mix it in, then work the dough into a ball with the palms until an equal consistency is achieved with no dry spots.
Apricot Glaze:
1. Roll out one 10-inch tart shell on the floured work surface and chill for about half an hour.
2. Place the shell into a pie pan or tart pan and mold a piece of aluminum foil in the pan.
3. Bake at 350°F (preheated oven) for 15-20 minutes until golden brown.
Peach Filling:
1. Cut each peach into eight sections and arrange snugly in the baked tart shell.
2. Lightly brush apricot glaze over all peaches and serve.
